title: Observe registration response missing Observe option
description: lichen/subsys/lichen/coap/coap_status.c:396-434. spec/11-lci.md §17.1 principle 5 (push via Observe, RFC 7641); RFC 7641 §4.1: a successful Observe registration response MUST carry the Observe option. Handler registers the observer via coap_resource_parse_observe() but the 2.05 response never appends COAP_OPTION_OBSERVE, so standards-based clients treat registration as failed. Fix: when parse_observe registers, append the Observe option with resource->age (as the notify path already does).
